entities.birthday_girl: a girl wearing a paper crown
entities.friend_1: a boy in a bow tie
entities.friend_2: a girl with curly red hair

scenes.title: The Birthday Party
scenes.background_prompt: A decorated living room with colorful balloons, a table with party plates and cups, wrapped presents in a pile, and a banner reading 'Happy Birthday'. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A decorated living room for a birthday party. A girl of about seven wearing a shiny paper crown and a pink party dress stands at the head of a table covered in a polka-dot tablecloth. A boy in a white shirt and a green bow tie sits to her left, clapping his hands excitedly. A girl with curly red hair and freckles in a yellow sundress sits across the table, blowing a party horn. A woman in a blue blouse carefully carries a round chocolate cake with seven lit candles toward the table from the kitchen doorway. Colorful balloons in red, blue, and gold are tied to the backs of chairs. A pile of wrapped presents in shiny paper sits on a side table. A banner reading 'Happy Birthday' stretches across the wall in glittery letters.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place birthday_girl at the head of the table, standing, wearing paper crown and pink dress. Place friend_1 to her left, sitting and clapping. Place friend_2 across the table, sitting and blowing a party horn. Place mother in the kitchen doorway (right), carrying a round chocolate cake with lit candles toward the table.
